title: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Texarkana, Bowie County, Texas, October 1885 asset acquisition manifest
repository: Library of Congress Geography and Map Division
large_binary_policy: Do not commit large TIFF, JPEG2000, or other downloaded map binaries until a repository storage policy is explicit.
runtime_notes: The LOC item and gallery pages are visible through browser-like access, but raw JSON/resource fetches from this runtime returned a Cloudflare browser challenge.
Candidate tile.loc.gov storage and IIIF patterns tested during this task returned 404, so no direct binary URLs are recorded as verified.
This manifest records durable LOC sheet pages and observed download menu metadata only.

assets.preferred_review_format: JPEG 1612x1912 px when acquired from the LOC download menu
assets.notes: Download options observed on the LOC sheet 1 page. No binary was downloaded or committed.

assets.preferred_review_format: JPEG derivative when acquired from the LOC download menu
assets.notes: The LOC gallery verifies sheet 2 exists and is dated 1885-10. Direct resource-page fetch for this sheet was blocked in the current runtime, so download menu sizes were not recorded.

assets.preferred_review_format: JPEG derivative when acquired from the LOC download menu
assets.notes: The LOC gallery verifies sheet 3 exists and is dated 1885-10. Direct resource-page fetch for this sheet timed out in the current runtime, so download menu sizes were not recorded.

assets.preferred_review_format: JPEG derivative when acquired from the LOC download menu
assets.notes: The LOC gallery verifies sheet 4 exists and is dated 1885-10. Direct resource-page fetch was not safely available in the current runtime, so download menu sizes were not recorded.

assets.preferred_review_format: JPEG 1612x1912 px when acquired from the LOC download menu
assets.notes: Download options observed on the LOC sheet 5 page. No binary was downloaded or committed.
